gross_anatomy: all gross frames wrong from payload bit 0 (quarter 0), i.e. whole-burst 90-degree rotation
residual_mechanism: not spurious sliding-lock (removed) and not preamble self-similarity (12/24 under 90deg); a genuine carrier-marginal rotation event that tracks the inter-board CFO phase drift (rate wandered 0.3-1.0% between runs)
verdict: LOCK_ERR_TOL 3->1 cut the floor ~4x (clean 92%->98.9%); pushing below ~1% needs differential encoding or a payload-consistency gate, not a lock-tolerance change
